CustomField.formula: IF( Override_Dealer_Information__c = false, SBQQ__SalesRep__r.FirstName & " " & SBQQ__SalesRep__r.LastName & " | " & SBQQ__SalesRep__r.Title & " | " & NATT_Account_Name__c, $User.FirstName & " " & $User.LastName & " | " & $User.Title & " | " & $User.CompanyName)
CustomField.label: Sender Information
